prospects.weakSiteSignal: Homepage is dated and the value proposition is generic.
prospects.weakIntakeSignal: Request service CTA is buried below the fold and the contact form is long.
prospects.ownerOperatedSignal: Owner name appears in local about copy and review replies.
prospects.auditSummary: Looks credible enough to earn traffic but weak enough to leak inbound leads.
prospects.outreachHook: You are probably paying for local demand already, but the current site makes quote requests harder than they need to be.
prospects.notes: Good first-block target. Likely owner reachable by phone.
prospects.priorityReason: Owner-led HVAC shop with obvious intake friction and strong call-first upside.
prospects.ownerEvidence: Owner name appears in review replies and local about copy.
prospects.localProofSummary: Established local business with enough trust proof to convert if intake improved.
prospects.idealPitchAngle: Missed inbound demand from weak request flow and buried CTA.
prospects.callOpener: You already look established enough to get calls, but the site makes quote requests harder than they need to be.
prospects.enrichmentSummary: Owner-led HVAC operator in the west suburbs with weak intake flow, no booking, and strong fit for a conversion-focused pitch.

prospects.weakSiteSignal: The site looks modern but trust proof is thin and service differentiation is vague.
prospects.weakIntakeSignal: No fast booking path from the hero section and no SMS-first consult flow.
prospects.ownerOperatedSignal: Small team and founder-led language across the site.
prospects.auditSummary: The brand looks polished enough, but conversion support is weaker than the visual polish suggests.
prospects.outreachHook: You look high-end, but the path from interest to booked consult still makes people work too hard.
prospects.notes: Good pro-services example with a softer opener.
prospects.priorityReason: Professional-services target with polished branding but weak consult conversion path.
prospects.ownerEvidence: Founder-led language and small team footprint.
prospects.localProofSummary: Brand polish is strong, but proof and conversion support lag behind the visual quality.
prospects.idealPitchAngle: Consult-path tightening for a high-consideration service.
prospects.callOpener: The brand looks premium, but the path from interest to consult still feels heavier than it should.
prospects.enrichmentSummary: Founder-led med spa with a polished front end but a softer-than-ideal consult conversion path.

prospects.weakSiteSignal: Weak local proof and no clear emergency-service emphasis.
prospects.weakIntakeSignal: No quote flow, no booking, and the phone number is easy to miss on mobile.
prospects.ownerOperatedSignal: Strong owner-led feel from copy and limited team size.
prospects.auditSummary: Likely a real operator with demand, but the website and intake path undersell the business.
prospects.outreachHook: If someone lands here on mobile and needs help fast, the site gives them too many chances to bounce.
prospects.priorityReason: Urgent-service plumbing operator with weak mobile intake and clear owner-led feel.
prospects.ownerEvidence: Strong owner-led tone and limited-team positioning.
prospects.localProofSummary: Feels like a real operator with urgency-demand fit but weak mobile intake.
prospects.idealPitchAngle: Emergency-intent capture and faster request handling.
prospects.callOpener: For a plumbing shop, the current mobile path gives urgent leads too many places to drop.
prospects.enrichmentSummary: Urgent-service plumbing prospect with weak mobile intake, no booking, and strong owner-operator signals.

inquiryTests.inquiryText: Queued HVAC response-time test for a cooling issue.
Submitted med spa consult inquiry to measure response speed.
